## Summary

<!-- Describe the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the one that applies. -->

- [ ] `feat` – new feature
- [ ] `fix` – bug fix
- [ ] `docs` – documentation update
- [ ] `test` – adding or updating tests
- [ ] `refactor` – code change that is neither a fix nor a feature
- [ ] `chore` – maintenance / tooling
- [ ] `perf` – performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` – CI/CD configuration change

## Scope

<!-- Check all scopes affected by this PR. -->

- [ ] `engine`
- [ ] `chronik`
- [ ] `hex`
- [ ] `keys`
- [ ] `metadata`
- [ ] `ft` (Fungible Tokens)
- [ ] `nft` (Non-Fungible Tokens)
- [ ] `cli`
- [ ] `utils`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] Code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../../docs/COMMITS.md)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Breaking changes include a migration guide (see [VERSIONING.md](../../docs/VERSIONING.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md))
